skindesc-new-liberty: Responsive skin for [https://librewiki.net/ LibreWiki], rewritten with SkinMustache
new-liberty-tooltip-purge: Purge the cache of this page.
new-liberty.css: /* CSS placed here will affect users of the New Liberty skin */
new-liberty.js: /* Any JavaScript here will be loaded for users using the New Liberty skin */
new-liberty-pref-layout-width-help: Set the maximum size of document area
new-liberty-pref-color-main-help: Main color that will be used in this site.
new-liberty-pref-color-second-help: Secondary color that will be used in this site.
new-liberty-pref-fonts: Select the font you want to use
new-liberty-pref-fonts-help: The font will be loaded from Google's servers except for the Malgun Gothic font.
new-liberty-pref-dark-help: Choose whether to follow system settings when activating dark mode.
new-liberty-pref-ads-belowarticle: Remove the ads below the article space
new-liberty-right-blockads-header: Can remove header ads on New Liberty skin.
new-liberty-right-blockads-right: Can remove right ads on New Liberty skin.
new-liberty-right-blockads-belowarticle: Can remove below article ads on New Liberty skin.
new-liberty-right-blockads-bottom: Can remove bottom ads on New Liberty skin.
